Identity.Name: StingHealthcareFacilityProfiles
Identity.Definition: Healthcare facility profile selector. Drives the HealthcareValidatorGate — each profile enables / disables specific healthcare validators (pressure, MGPS, EES, water, anti-ligature, radiation, RDS, …). Written to PRJ_ORG_HEALTH_PACK_PROFILE_TXT on the project; non-healthcare projects skip the whole healthcare pack and incur zero cost.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING Healthcare Pack (Phases H-1..H-30); NHS England Healthcare Building Notes (HBN) facility-type catalogue

Value.Definition: Full acute hospital — every validator active. Wards, theatres, ICU, imaging, pathology, pharmacy, A&E. Default for major acute trust hospitals.
Acute hospital — full validator set minus mental-health and dental-specific validators.
Community / step-down hospital — limited theatres, no ICU. Drops EES Type A requirements; relaxes pressure-cascade.
Dental practice / clinic. Activates dental-chair water-safety validator and dental amalgam-separator schedule; suppresses theatre / EES validators.
Standalone imaging centre — MRI / CT / X-ray. Activates RAD_* validators + MRI-zone validator; suppresses MGS / pressure / EES.
Mental health unit. Activates LIG_* anti-ligature validators + observation-line validator; suppresses theatre / acute clinical validators.
Maternity / women's hospital. Activates maternity validators (LDR rooms, midwifery-led birthing); standard pressure + MGS.
Clinical research / biomedical research facility. Activates BSL containment validators, pressure-cascade for animal facilities, decon flow.
Hospice / palliative care. Relaxed clinical validators; emphasis on dignity, family rooms, end-of-life pathway facilities.
